programme.title: BKFC 31: Richman vs. Doolittle
programme.desc: Features Mike Richman vs. Isaac Doolittle, Jake Lindsey vs. Brandon Girtz, plus Chris Camozzi vs. Bubba McDaniel in bare knuckle boxing action from Broomfield, Colo. From Oct.15, 2022.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Eric Hicks, Pennzoil Don, David Oppenheim, Mr Dr Batman, Evan Sofer, James Bord and Eric Persson play $200/$400 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.desc: Eric Hicks, Pennzoil Don, David Oppenheim, Mr Dr Batman, Evan Sofer, James Bord and Eric Persson play $200/$400 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: No. 2-ranked featherweight Adam Borics meets Mads Burnell in the main event. Plus, a light heavyweight bout between Phil Davis and Julius Anglickas. From the Family Arena in St. Louis, March 12, 2022.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: From Seneca Allegany Resort and Casino in Salamanca, New York.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.title: Flex Fight Series
programme.desc: New York's #1 combat sports promotion returns for Flex Fight Series 56: Mosh Pit live from HK Hall!

programme.title: BKFC 32
programme.desc: Features Reginald Barnett Jr. vs. Geane Herrera, Jared Warren vs. Jay Jackson, plus Bobby Taylor vs. Gabriel Freyre in bare knuckle boxing action from Orlando, Fla. From Nov. 5, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 33
programme.desc: Features Houston Alexander vs. Joey Beltran, Kevin Croom vs. Sean Wilson, plus Carlos Trinidad vs. Rynell Riley in bare knuckle boxing action. From Nov. 18, 2022.

programme.title: Karate Combat 60
programme.desc: Ilyas Khamzin vs. Alex Lohoré, middleweight championship. Adam Noi vs. Luiz Rocha, vacant featherweight championship. From Yekaterinburg, Russia.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Unbeaten featherweight champ A.J. McKee battles former top pound-for-pound and two-division champ Patricio Pitbull in one of the most anticipated rematches of all time. Plus, 205-pound champ Vadim Nemkov vs. Corey Anderson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.title: BKFC 34
programme.desc: Features Luis Palomino vs. Tom Shoaff for BKFC lightweight title, and David Mundell vs. Francesco Ricci for vacant BKFC middleweight title from Hollywood, Florida. From Dec. 3, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 35
programme.desc: Features Gorjan Slaveski vs. Yosdenis Cedeno, and Keith Richardson vs. Justin Scoggins in bare knuckle boxing action from Myrtle Beach, S.C. From Jan. 27, 2023.

programme.desc: From Colonial Life Arena, Columbia, S.C. on Nov. 3, 2023.

programme.title: BKFC 18: Beltran vs. Shewmaker
programme.desc: BKFC title bouts featuring Joey Beltran vs. Sam Shewmaker, Hector Lombard vs. Joe Riggs, Luis Palomino vs. Tyler Goodjohn, and Thiago Alves vs. Ulysses Diaz in bare knuckle boxing action from Miami, Florida. From June 26, 2021.

programme.title: BKFC 54
programme.desc: Rosen Dimitrov vs. Todor Zhelyazkov, middleweight; Georgi Valentinov vs. Bojan Kosendar, middleweight. From Arena Sofia in Sofia, Bulgaria. From Nov. 17, 2023.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: SAR uses helicopters and controlled detonations for a rescue where calculated risks and courage are vital.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A mountain biker crashes on a remote trail. SAR performs a long-line helicopter rescue against the clock.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR faces its toughest day yet: a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and an avalanche.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A snowboarder is caught in a high-risk avalanche zone. SAR braves the sliding terrain for a risky extraction.

programme.title: The Outlaw Ocean
programme.desc: This 10-part short film series focuses on human rights and environmental crimes on the high seas.

programme.title: The Outlaw Ocean
programme.desc: Ian Urbina takes viewers onboard ships on the South China Sea to explore the overfishing pandemic.

programme.title: No Days Off
programme.sub-title: Mind Body Connection with Gabby Reece and Laird Hamilton
programme.desc: Sasha journeys to Malibu, CA to meet up with professional athletes Laird Hamilton and Gabby Reece.

programme.title: No Days Off
programme.desc: Sasha sees firsthand how businesses and individuals can work to make Maine and our world a better place.

programme.title: The Road Less Eaten with Biju Thomas
programme.desc: Chef Biju meets his longtime friend Greg Erwin for a taste of Nashville, Tennessee.

programme.title: The Road Less Eaten with Biju Thomas
programme.desc: Josh Crumpton takes Biju to fly fishing in Wimberley, Texas, along with sampling a wild game food truck.

programme.sub-title: Stifel Lake Placid World Cup Men's 20k Free Mass Start (March 2026)
programme.desc: USSS 2025-26: Stifel Lake Placid World Cup Men's 20k Free Mass Start (March 2026).

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: From riding bulls in Fort Worth to off-roading in the Chihuahuan desert we forge our path across Texas.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Beat Monday is a series of epic weekend adventures to see what's possible between Friday and Monday.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.sub-title: Grand Canyon: Rim to Rim to Rim Traverse
programme.desc: Beat Monday is a series of epic weekend adventures to see what's possible between Friday and Monday.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Epic weekend adventures designed to push the boundaries of what's possible.
